items.name: Dynamite
items.notes: printed: bay scallop sauteed w/ vegetables, mozzarella, served over california roll; base roll fillings not printed

items.name: Salmon Baked
items.notes: printed: crab meat, avocado, salmon, baked w/ mayo sauce

items.name: Snow
items.notes: printed: cream cheese, red onion escolar (no comma printed before escolar); baked roll section

items.name: Baby Lobster
items.notes: printed: langostino sauteed w/ vegetables, mozzarella, served over california roll; base roll fillings not printed

items.name: Volcano
items.notes: printed: crab meat, avocado, spicy tuna, salmon, baked w/ mayo sauce

items.name: Rainbow
items.notes: printed: crab meat, avo, cucumber, tuna, salmon, albacore, escolar, shrimp

items.name: Double Rainbow
items.notes: printed: crab meat, avo, cucumber, 2 tuna, 2 salmon, 2 shrimp, 2 albacore, 2 escolar (2 pcs each fish topping)

items.name: Big Mama
items.notes: printed: chopped scallop, cucumber, salmon masago (no comma printed before masago)

items.name: Jon's Special
items.notes: chili pepper icon (spicy); printed: spicy tuna, cilantro, avo, cuc, sliced jalapeno, seared pepper salmon

items.name: Double Salmon Lover
items.notes: printed: crab meat, avocado, cucumber, 8pcs salmon
